summary: Verified both bug fixes for Hospital Meeting App: Bug Fix 1 - 'Create New Patient' form now has all 14 fields with section headers; Bug Fix 2 - 'Add Participant' button is visible and functional in meeting detail page sidebar.
seed_data_creation: Created test patient 'FullTest Patient' with MRN-FULL-TEST-001 to verify all 14 fields save correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified. Create New Patient form has all 14 fields organized into Basic Information (8 fields) and Medical Information (6 fields) sections. Add Participant button is visible in sidebar with data-testid='add-participant-btn'.

bug_fix_1_create_patient_form.description: Create New Patient form has ALL 14 fields with section headers

bug_fix_1_patient_creation.description: Creating patient with all fields saves correctly to backend
bug_fix_1_patient_creation.evidence: Patient 'FullTest Patient' created with all fields, patient count increased from 4 to 5, diagnosis 'Hypertension, Type 2 Diabetes' visible in patient card

bug_fix_2_add_participant_button.description: Add Participant button visible in meeting detail page sidebar
bug_fix_2_add_participant_button.evidence: Button found with data-testid='add-participant-btn' and is_visible=True

bug_fix_2_add_participant_dialog.description: Add Participant button opens dialog correctly
bug_fix_2_add_participant_dialog.evidence: Dialog opens with 'Add Participants' title, shows 'Existing Doctors' and 'Invite by Email' tabs
